title: CS Jobs 2026 – Chief Technical Officer
shortInfo: Criminal Investigation Department Jharkhand (CID Jharkhand) has released a recruitment notification for 1 post including Chief Technical Officer for B.E or MCA and candidates can apply offline from the notification release date to 03 June 2026 at Jharkhand Police Official Website.

basic_details.job_title: CID Jharkhand Chief Technical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Criminal Investigation Department Jharkhand (CID Jharkhand) has released a recruitment notification for 1 post including Chief Technical Officer for B.E or MCA and candidates can apply offline from the notification release date to 03 June 2026 at Jharkhand Police Official Website.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E. in IT/Computer Science/Equivalent or MCA, M.Tech in CS/IT/Information Security (desirable), Minimum 5 years experience in IT
qualification.details: Chief Technical Officer: Bachelor of Engineering in IT, Computer Science or equivalent or MCA from a recognized Institute. M.Tech in CS/IT/Information Security desirable. Minimum 5 years work experience in IT. Proficiency in security/forensic tools, programming/scripting, data analysis, hardware extraction, networking protocols, wireless technologies. Global certifications like CEH/CISM/CISSP preferable.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.jhpolice.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the CID Jharkhand CTO recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Chief Technical Officer (CTO) post is 03 June 2026.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Chief Technical Officer (CTO) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 60,000/- per month.

faq.question: What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the CTO post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor of Engineering in IT, Computer Science or equivalent or MCA. M.Tech in CS/IT/Information Security is desirable.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the CTO post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the Chief Technical Officer (CTO) post.

faq.question: What is the required work experience for the CTO role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 5 years of work experience in IT is required for the Chief Technical Officer (CTO) position.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the CID Jharkhand CTO recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on Qualification, Work experience, and Interview/Presentation.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of CID Jharkhand, www.jhpolice.gov.in.

faq.question: What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis.

seo_tags: Criminal Investigation Department Jharkhand Chief Technical Officer (CTO) Recruitment 2026
